title: BasicPredictedEvent
description: Predicted Event object that contains details about one or more predicted events as identified by the system.

id.description: The unique identifier of the predicted event.

link.description: Reference path link to fetch more information about the specific predicted event.

categoryId.description: Identifier of the category assigned to the predicted event. This is  the id field of the transaction category resource. The supported  values are provided by GET transactions/categories.

category.description: The name of the category assigned to the predicted event. This is the  category field of the transaction category resource. The supported  values are provided by GET transactions/categories.

lastTrasactionAmount.description: The amount of the last aggregated transaction that was used to  predict the event.

lastTransactionDate.description: The date of the last aggregated transaction associated with the predicted event.
